calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Patricia McGinnis, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Christiano Damasceno De Oliveira.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Patricia McGinnis, and against the defendant Christiano Damasceno De Oliveira as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,650.00.
Holdover Damages - $2,365.00.
Costs - $500.00.
Total - $4,515.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Patricia McGinnis is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 160 Sussex Street, San Francisco, CA 94131. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Off Calendar
